creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 206028
patch for gdal 3.0.1 Makefile against 2.4.2

According to [1], the functionality for GRASS drivers could be included (as an option). The patch contains the diff for the Makefile. What do you think?


[1] https://github.com/OSGeo/gdal/blob/master/gdal/MIGRATION_GUIDE.TXT
